Button

data.value: Control

data.name: DigitalMeter1PsDescription
data.value:
Digital Meter 1
Visualise the signal into a Digital Meter with small digits.

data.value:
Digital Meter 2
Visualise the signal into a Digital Meter with big digits display.

data.name: DigitalMeter7PsDescription
data.value:
Digital Meter 3
Visualise the signal into a Digital Meter with 7 segment display.

data.value: Signal Display

Gauge

Knob

Manometer

Numeric Input

data.value: Do you want to remove the selected reference curve(s)?

Slider

data.name: SrcRateErr
data.value: The mapped signals must have the same source and sample rate.

data.value:
Switch

Tachometer

Thermometer
Visualise the signals in tachometer.

data.value: The element '{0}' expect two input signals.
